overall.description: First-person exploration footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing the abandoned Grand Imperial Mall in Pacifica. The camera moves from the main approach road through the derelict plaza, passing the Brooklyn Barista stand, and circling around the mall's exterior under bright morning sunlight with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide approach road to abandoned mall complex

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of the deserted multi-lane road toward the Grand Imperial Mall entrance

entered.detail: large abandoned shopping mall with teal and beige facade panels and massive geodesic dome framework overhead
intricate white metal truss framework covering the mall roof
large white amusement park ferris wheel adjacent to the mall structure
tall advertising billboard with purple and white graphics
tall advertising billboard with fashion imagery

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide, empty asphalt road leading directly to the Grand Imperial Mall. The massive mall complex dominates the center view with its distinctive geodesic dome framework, while a large ferris wheel stands to the left. Advertising billboards frame the sides of the road. The camera moves forward steadily in bright morning sunlight with long shadows cast across the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza entrance with coffee stand and vending machines

events.description: camera begins turning left off the main road toward the plaza area
ground surface transitions from asphalt road to concrete plaza sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main approach road and moving toward the Brooklyn Barista stand in the plaza

notable_agents.action: person in red pants standing on the sidewalk near the plaza entrance

entered.detail: retro-futuristic coffee stand with large orange 'Brooklyn Barista' signage and blue dome roof
row of colorful automated vending machines with advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left from the main road onto the concrete plaza, approaching the Brooklyn Barista coffee stand with its distinctive orange signage. A pedestrian in red pants stands visible on the left sidewalk. The Grand Imperial Mall shifts to the right side of the frame while the ferris_wheel moves to center background. Vending machines line the right side near the barista stand.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with abandoned vehicles and amusement park debris

events.description: Brooklyn Barista structure temporarily blocks view of the mall while passing closely

agents.ego_description: circling around the Brooklyn Barista stand and exploring the derelict plaza area with abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: NPC in white shirt crouching near the Brooklyn Barista entrance

entered.detail: derelict cars and trucks parked and abandoned in the plaza area
scattered trash, broken concrete, and abandoned items across the plaza ground

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, the camera passes the Brooklyn Barista where an NPC in a white shirt is crouched near the entrance. The view opens to show abandoned vehicles and debris scattered across the cracked pavement. The Grand Imperial Mall now dominates the left side of the frame while the ferris_wheel remains visible in the left background. The camera circles around the barista structure and continues exploring the derelict amusement area.

scene_state.functional_zone: side street along mall with distant downtown views

events.description: exiting the plaza and entering the side street running along the mall's eastern facade

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking along the side of the mall toward the main street with distant city views

entered.detail: tall modern skyscrapers visible in the distant city center
tall modern street lighting poles along the road

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a side street running alongside the Grand Imperial Mall, which now fills the left side of the frame at close range. The plaza and ferris_wheel are left behind as the view opens to show the distant downtown skyline with modern skyscrapers. The street is cracked and littered with debris, lined with palm trees on the right, and leads toward the main road with minimal traffic visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide approach road into the derelict plaza of the Grand Imperial Mall, eventually turning toward the distant city skyline. It begins by moving steadily down an empty asphalt road under bright morning sunlight, with the mall's geodesic dome and a large ferris wheel looming ahead. As the camera turns left onto the concrete plaza, the view shifts toward a Brooklyn Barista stand with orange signage and vending machines, while the mall moves to the right of the frame. The scene then expands across the cracked pavement of the abandoned amusement area, passing debris and crouched figures before circling around the barista structure. Finally, the camera turns right onto a littered side street, leaving the plaza behind as the massive mall walls fill the left side of the frame and the view opens toward the modern skyscrapers of the distant downtown skyline.
